title: Symbol
description: The symbol token defines a symbol or sub-unit of a parent symbol. https://dev-docs.kicad.org/en/file-formats/sexpr-intro/index.html#_symbols

library_id.title: Library ID (Symbol ID)
library_id.description: The ID of the symbol within a symbol library.

in_bom.title: Include in BOM
in_bom.description: Defines if a symbol is to be include in the bill of material output.

symbol_properties.title: Symbol Properties
symbol_properties.description: List of properties that define the symbol

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: The reference of the symbol. The reference is used to identify the symbol in the library.

graphic_items.title: Graphic Items
graphic_items.description: Graphical definition of the symbol in SVG format.

pins.title: Pins
pins.description: A list of pins that are used by the symbol. This section can be empty if the symbol does not have any pins.
